---
title: "Peace Corps Experiences"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    css: styles/peacecorps.css
---
::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/georgian_church.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Georgian 14th Century Church  
A quiet moment before the day began.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/handsome_cat.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Summer Time Lounging  
The neighborhood cats always knew the best places to rest.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/mestia_cow.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Mestia and Svan Towers  
A landscape where cows and mountains share the same calm.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/motor_cat.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Rallying for a Ride  
A cat with somewhere important to be.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/mtchadi.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Berikaoba Mtchadi  
Warm bread, cold air, and the feeling of celebration.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/night_in_tkibuli.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Evening Walks in Tkibuli  
Streetlights, quiet roads, and the rhythm of small‑town nights.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/oba.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
An Experience at Berikaoba  
Tradition, color, and the energy of community.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/tkibuli_lift.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Winter in Georgia  
Snow‑covered hills and the slow hum of daily life.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/tkibuli_office.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Inside the Tkibuli Office  
Where projects began, conversations unfolded, and ideas took shape.
</div>
:::

::: {.scene}
![](photos/peace_corps_photos/tkibuli_town.jpg){.full-img}
<div class="caption">
Racha and Imereti is the Place to Be  
A region that shaped my service and my memories.
</div>
:::
